package rulecoverage

func PositiveServiceMethodHandlesPaginationOrQueryParsing() string {
    ruleID := "service_method_handles_pagination_or_query_parsing"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Services that parse page, sort, filter, or URL values that should already be normalized at the transport boundary."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
